## Spec changes

> ⚠️ Changes to `src/lib/schema/`, `public/schema/`, or the attestation format
> require an RFC. Please open a GitHub Issue with the `[RFC]` prefix and complete
> the review period before submitting a spec-changing PR.
> See [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md) for the full process.

If this PR includes a spec change, link the RFC issue here: #

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `pactspec conformance` — all tests pass
- [ ] Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` — no type errors
- [ ] Tested against local dev server
